comment: Capability-negotiation wire fixture (CTRL-01). envelopeHex is a length-delimited ServerWelcome envelope encoded by the REAL session host (hosts/session-host/tests/welcome_fixture.rs asserts the host still produces exactly these bytes); clients/web/wire.test.mjs decodes the SAME bytes and asserts the negotiated scopes, limits, PACKED reference-frame lists, and PACKED mode-target lists survive the browser decoder. Regenerate by running the Rust test and copying its reported hex.
